.canvas-card-menu.background: rgb(22, 20, 31) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.nav-file-title-content::before.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
.nav-file-title-content::before.font-family: "??", "??", "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

.status-bar.background: rgb(22, 20, 31) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.tag.background: rgb(36, 32, 50) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(18, 16, 25) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

a.external-link[data-tooltip-position=\".background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(rgb(139, 128, 249) 0%, rgb(139, 128, 249) 100%) repeat-x scroll 0px 100% / 1px 2px padding-box border-box

a.internal-link.is-unresolved[data-href=.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(rgb(25, 216, 213) 0%, rgb(25, 216, 213) 100%) repeat-x scroll 0px 100% / 1px 2px padding-box border-box

a.internal-link[data-href=\"callouts\"][.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(rgb(25, 216, 213) 0%, rgb(25, 216, 213) 100%) repeat-x scroll 0px 100% / 1px 2px padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgb(36, 32, 50) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--folder-filter: invert(30%) sepia(99%) saturate(1210%) hue-rotate(51deg) brightness(120%) contrast(100%)
body.background: rgb(18, 16, 25) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(18, 16, 25) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

code.background: rgb(36, 32, 50) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(18, 16, 25) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(22, 20, 31) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(22, 20, 31) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(18, 16, 25) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(22, 20, 31) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgb(139, 128, 249) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgb(252, 252, 252) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgb(90, 255, 21) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(36, 32, 50) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(36, 32, 50) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
